brand.name: VanguardCX
brand.tone: Objective, extremely fast, highly legible, un-distracting
brand.reasoning: Enterprise B2B agent-assist dashboards require low cognitive load and maximum data density. Color is used strictly for function (sentiment/alerts), not decoration. Moving away from the 'SaaS Purple/Teal' cliché to a stark, authoritative Swiss aesthetic.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-medium text-[#0A0A0A] leading-tight
rules.overline: uppercase text-[10px] sm:text-xs tracking-[0.15em] font-bold text-[#525252]

rules: ABSOLUTELY NO PURPLE OR TEAL (#9D4CDD or #1B93A4).
Use 1px borders instead of drop shadows to define surfaces.
Color is Function Only: 95% of the UI should be monochrome. Color exists only to guide action or indicate status (e.g., Red for escalation, Blue for next-best-action).

layout.spacing_scale: Use standard Tailwind spacing. For the Agent Workspace, use 'Control Room Grid' (tight gaps: gap-2 to gap-4) to maximize data density.
layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid. Base grid-cols-12 for workspaces. Every pixel utilized.
layout.radius: rounded-sm (2px) or rounded-none to emphasize the technical Swiss aesthetic.
layout.shadows: Minimal. Use shadow-sm for popovers and dropdowns, otherwise rely purely on 1px borders for structure.
layout.surfaces: Use 'Grid Borders' pattern. Expose the skeleton, make the grid visible in analytics panels.

motion.hover_states: Hard color swaps (e.g., bg-white text-black -> bg-black text-white) or sharp 1px border highlights.
motion.agent_workspace: Live transcript should use framer-motion to smoothly push new lines up without jarring the agent's reading flow.

components_strategy.buttons: Sharp corners. High contrast. Primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-[#0055FF].
components_strategy.cards: White background, 1px solid border, no shadow. CardHeader should have a subtle bottom border to separate from content.
components_strategy.live_transcript_panel: Use IBM Plex Sans for legibility. Speaker A/B denoted by small bold mono tags. Active utterance highlighted with slight blue tint background. Terminal-like flow.
components_strategy.nba_cards: Next-Best-Action suggestions. Floating or dedicated right panel. Highlighted with a subtle 1px primary color border and an icon.
components_strategy.sentiment_meter: Horizontal minimal bar chart or dot indicator. Red (high risk) -> Amber -> Green. No gradients, block colors only.
components_strategy.compliance_checklist: Dense checklist UI. Checkbox turns solid black when ticked. Strikethrough text when done.
components_strategy.forms_and_inputs: Shadcn components customized to have `rounded-none`, sharp borders, and high-contrast focus rings (`focus:ring-[#0055FF]`).

iconography.style: Regular or Light weight. High legibility, geometric.

hero_image.description: Abstract white geometric pattern for landing page hero background to convey structural AI and intelligence.

texture_noise.description: Monochrome grainy noise. Use as a fixed background overlay with opacity-5 mix-blend-multiply on marketing pages to break digital flatness.

agent_profile.description: Professional agent photo for user profile / avatar / landing page testimonial.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA/WCAG AA contrast. Especially on sentiment indicators.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid="call-transcript-panel").

pages_to_build: Landing Page: Minimalist, typographic, high contrast. F-pattern layout.
Login: JWT auth, split screen with abstract geometry image.
Agent Workspace: Hero surface. 4-pane dense layout. Left: Live transcript. Center: AI Assist (NBA). Right: Knowledge base & Compliance.
Supervisor Dashboard: Heatmaps, live call monitoring list, escalation alerts.
KB Management: Document upload interface, data tables with sticky headers.
Analytics: Post-call metrics, charting with Recharts (monochrome palettes with semantic accents).
Settings: API integrations, webhooks, omnichannel setup.
